'''âz-y-r''' ('''kazayar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:logomachize|logomachize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:logomachize|logomachize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-y-r
|-
! Lemma
| kazayar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizayar|thizayar]] || [[word:jizayar|jizayar]] || [[word:shizayar|shizayar]] || [[word:kizayar|kizayar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzayar|thuthuzayar]] || [[word:jujuzayar|jujuzayar]] || [[word:shushuzayar|shushuzayar]] || [[word:kukuzayar|kukuzayar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzayar|thuzayar]] || [[word:juzayar|juzayar]] || [[word:shuzayar|shuzayar]] || [[word:kuzayar|kuzayar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzayar|thuzayar]] || [[word:juzayar|juzayar]] || [[word:shuzayar|shuzayar]] || [[word:kuzayar|kuzayar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezayar|thezayar]] || [[word:jezayar|jezayar]] || [[word:shezayar|shezayar]] || [[word:kezayar|kezayar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozayar|thothozayar]] || [[word:jojozayar|jojozayar]] || [[word:shoshozayar|shoshozayar]] || [[word:kokozayar|kokozayar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozayar|thozayar]] || [[word:jozayar|jozayar]] || [[word:shozayar|shozayar]] || [[word:kozayar|kozayar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozayar|thozayar]] || [[word:jozayar|jozayar]] || [[word:shozayar|shozayar]] || [[word:kozayar|kozayar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzayar|thĂŠzayar]] || [[word:jĂŠzayar|jĂŠzayar]] || [[word:shĂŠzayar|shĂŠzayar]] || [[word:kĂŠzayar|kĂŠzayar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazayar|thathazayar]] || [[word:jajazayar|jajazayar]] || [[word:shashazayar|shashazayar]] || [[word:kakazayar|kakazayar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazayar|thazayar]] || [[word:jazayar|jazayar]] || [[word:shazayar|shazayar]] || [[word:kazayar|kazayar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazayar|thazayar]] || [[word:jazayar|jazayar]] || [[word:shazayar|shazayar]] || [[word:kazayar|kazayar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazayar|shazayar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazayar|goshazayar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazayar|gokishazayar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazayarnĂŒ|shazayarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazayarnknĂŒ|goshazayarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazayarnĂŒ|gokishazayarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazayarshĂ«|shazayarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazayarnkshĂ«|goshazayarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazayarshĂ«|gokishazayarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazayaro|shazayaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazayarnkro|goshazayarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazayaro|gokishazayaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazayarmu|shazayarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazayarnkmu|goshazayarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazayarmu|gokishazayarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazayarsher|shazayarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazayarnksher|goshazayarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazayarsher|gokishazayarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazayarng|shazayarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazayarnkng|goshazayarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazayarng|gokishazayarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazayarya|shazayarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazayarnkya|goshazayarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazayarya|gokishazayarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazayaryam|shazayaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazayarnkyam|goshazayarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazayaryam|gokishazayaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazayarnĂŒshĂ«|shazayarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazayarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazayarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazayarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazayarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazayarnĂŒro|shazayarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazayarnknĂŒro|goshazayarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazayarnĂŒro|gokishazayarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazayarnĂŒmu|shazayarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazayarnknĂŒmu|goshazayarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazayarnĂŒmu|gokishazayarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazayarshĂ«nĂŒ|shazayarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazayarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazayarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazayarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazayarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazayarshĂ«ro|shazayarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazayarnkshĂ«ro|goshazayarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazayarshĂ«ro|gokishazayarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazayarshĂ«mu|shazayarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazayarnkshĂ«mu|goshazayarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazayarshĂ«mu|gokishazayarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazayaronĂŒ|shazayaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazayarnkronĂŒ|goshazayarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazayaronĂŒ|gokishazayaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazayaroshĂ«|shazayaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazayarnkroshĂ«|goshazayarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazayaroshĂ«|gokishazayaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazayaromu|shazayaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazayarnkromu|goshazayarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazayaromu|gokishazayaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazayarmunĂŒ|shazayarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazayarnkmunĂŒ|goshazayarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazayarmunĂŒ|gokishazayarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazayarmushĂ«|shazayarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazayarnkmushĂ«|goshazayarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazayarmushĂ«|gokishazayarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazayarmuro|shazayarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazayarnkmuro|goshazayarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazayarmuro|gokishazayarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
